title: Gleam stdlib wrappers — data conversion and encoding
purpose: The gleam_stdlib module contains Erlang FFI wrapper functions that Gleam's standard library delegates to. This brief covers 18 data conversion and encoding wrappers: type classification, parsing, dict/list construction, and base16/base64/bit_array operations.
task: Implement 18 gleam_stdlib BIFs for data conversion and encoding.
boundaries: SHALL NOT implement gleam_stdlib I/O or URI functions (those are B-040b)
SHALL NOT implement full RFC 3986 URI parsing
SHALL handle all immediate and common boxed term types in classify_dynamic

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib data conversion wrappers (10 functions)
requirements.spec: Register under gleam_stdlib: classify_dynamic/1, dict/1, float/1, float_to_string/1, index/2, int/1, int_from_base_string/2, parse_float/1, parse_int/1, wrap_list/1.

requirements.title: gleam_stdlib encoding and binary wrappers (8 functions)
requirements.spec: Register under gleam_stdlib: base16_decode/1, base16_encode/1, base64_decode/1, base64_encode/2, bit_array_concat/1, bit_array_pad_to_bytes/1, bit_array_slice/3, bit_array_to_int_and_size/1.
